auditFindings.issue: Core Web Vitals failing on 78% of product pages
auditFindings.impact: Google ranking penalty + poor UX = lost conversions
auditFindings.fix: Image optimization, lazy loading, CSS cleanup

auditFindings.issue: 2,400+ product pages not indexed by Google
auditFindings.impact: Missing ~35% potential organic traffic
auditFindings.fix: XML sitemap rebuild, internal linking, crawl budget optimization

auditFindings.issue: No structured data (Product, Offer, BreadcrumbList Schema)
auditFindings.impact: Missing rich snippets = lower CTR in SERPs
auditFindings.fix: Implement Product + Offer + Review Schema across all product pages

auditFindings.issue: Duplicate meta descriptions on 1,200+ category pages
auditFindings.impact: Keyword cannibalization between categories
auditFindings.fix: Unique meta templates per category level

auditFindings.issue: Category pages thin content — avg 50 words
auditFindings.impact: Poor topical authority, low rankings
auditFindings.fix: Category content enrichment (300-500 words per category)

auditFindings.issue: No hreflang implementation for KA/EN versions
auditFindings.impact: Language confusion in SERPs, duplicate content risk
auditFindings.fix: hreflang tags + proper URL structure for both languages

auditFindings.issue: Internal search generating indexable URLs
auditFindings.impact: Crawl budget waste on low-value pages
auditFindings.fix: Noindex internal search result pages, canonicalization

auditFindings.issue: Mobile page speed 38/100
auditFindings.impact: Poor mobile UX, lower mobile rankings
auditFindings.fix: Mobile-specific optimizations, AMP for key landing pages

auditFindings.issue: No blog/content hub for informational keywords
auditFindings.impact: Missing top-of-funnel traffic
auditFindings.fix: Content strategy + blog section implementation

auditFindings.issue: Image alt texts missing on 60% of product images
auditFindings.impact: Lost image search traffic + accessibility issues
auditFindings.fix: Automated alt text generation from product names

quickWins.action: Fix Product Schema on top 500 products
Optimize Core Web Vitals on top 50 landing pages

temu-example.recommendationReasoning: High competition eCommerce market with 2-language requirement (KA/EN). Current technical debt is significant but fixable. Growth tier provides the content volume and backlink budget needed to close the gap with Extra.ge and MyMarket.ge within 6-9 months.

bullets: 2,400+ product pages invisible to Google — immediate indexation opportunity
Core Web Vitals failing on 78% of pages — fixable within 2-3 weeks
No structured data = missing rich snippets on every product page
Competitor Extra.ge captures 14x your organic traffic with similar product range
Conservative projection: +75% organic traffic within 6 months
executiveSummary.narrative: Temu Georgia has a strong product catalog but critical technical SEO gaps are preventing Google from properly indexing and ranking your pages. With 2,400 pages invisible to search and Core Web Vitals failing across 78% of the site, you're leaving significant revenue on the table. Our analysis shows a clear path to close the gap with market leaders through systematic technical fixes and content optimization.

mutualActionPlan.step: Dev team kickoff — CMS access & deployment flow

transcriptHighlights.quote: Todua Clinic has 340 organic keywords, but only 35 are in the top 10 — that means 90% of your content isn't visible.
The biggest opportunity is MedicalOrganization Schema. Once implemented, your service pages can show star ratings, pricing, and availability directly in Google.
Your GMB profile is only 40% complete. Evex has 100% completion + weekly posts. That's why they dominate the Local Pack.
Evex has 4x your organic traffic not because they have better services — but because they have 3.5x more indexed content.
Month 1-3 is foundation: fix technical issues, optimize GMB, implement Schema. Month 3-6 is growth: content expansion, English pages, link building.
The Growth package at 3,550 lari includes everything Todua Clinic needs — 2-language support, 4,000 words of medical content monthly, and dedicated Local SEO.

auditFindings.issue: No Arabic content — missing 45% of local search demand
auditFindings.impact: Invisible to Arabic-speaking patients searching in their native language
auditFindings.fix: Arabic content strategy + hreflang implementation

auditFindings.issue: MedicalOrganization Schema incomplete — missing Physician, MedicalProcedure
auditFindings.impact: No rich results for doctor or procedure searches
auditFindings.fix: Complete Schema.org medical markup

auditFindings.issue: DHA compliance metadata missing from health content
auditFindings.impact: Risk of DHA advertising regulation issues
auditFindings.fix: Medical disclaimer framework + content review process

auditFindings.issue: Google Business Profile — only 2 of 12 locations optimized
auditFindings.impact: 10 locations losing Local Pack visibility
auditFindings.fix: Multi-location GBP optimization

auditFindings.issue: No E-E-A-T signals — doctor author pages, credentials, citations missing
auditFindings.impact: Lower trust signals for YMYL medical content
auditFindings.fix: Author entity strategy + medical citation building

auditFindings.issue: Page speed 42/100 on mobile
auditFindings.impact: Poor patient experience + mobile ranking penalty
auditFindings.fix: Performance optimization audit + implementation

auditFindings.issue: No insurance directory listings (DHA approved)
auditFindings.impact: Missing referral traffic from insurance provider searches
auditFindings.fix: Directory submission + citation building

auditFindings.issue: Review management — 3.8 star average, low response rate
auditFindings.impact: Competitor clinics at 4.5+ stars dominate trust signals
auditFindings.fix: Review generation + response workflow

quickWins.action: Complete GBP optimization for all 12 locations
DHA compliance framework for existing content

conservative.assumptions: English optimization only, basic GBP, current CR

base.assumptions: EN + AR content, full GBP, Schema, CR improves to 2.5%

aggressive.assumptions: Full bilingual SEO + medical tourism + insurance partnerships

dubai-medical-example.recommendationReasoning: Multi-location healthcare in Dubai's competitive market requires premium investment. Arabic content strategy, DHA compliance framework, and 12-location GBP optimization demand dedicated resources. Premium tier provides 3-language support, priority SLA, and the backlink budget needed to compete with Aster and Mediclinic.

complianceNotes: All health content must include medical disclaimers per DHA advertising regulations
No guarantee of treatment outcomes in any published content
Doctor credentials must be DHA-verified before publishing author profiles
Patient testimonials require written consent per UAE healthcare law

marketReality.competition: 350+ clinics competing for top 50 medical keywords
marketReality.patientJourney: 78% of patients research online before booking — Google is the #1 discovery channel
marketReality.trend: Medical tourism growing 12% YoY — international patients search in English first

trustArchitecture.entity: Google Business Profile optimization for all 12 locations + Knowledge Graph entity
trustArchitecture.expertise: Doctor author profiles with DHA license numbers, specializations, published papers
trustArchitecture.reviews: Structured review generation from verified patients + response SLA
trustArchitecture.citations: DHA directory, UAE medical directories, international health platforms

multilingualStrategy.english: Primary — 60% of content, targeting expats + medical tourists
multilingualStrategy.arabic: Secondary — 40% of content, targeting local Emirati + Arab expat patients
multilingualStrategy.hreflang: en-AE / ar-AE structure with proper canonical setup
multilingualStrategy.intentDifferences: Arabic searches tend to be more location-specific; English searches more procedure-specific
